def positive_urlparse_in_loop_on_invariant_base():
    rule_id = "urlparse_in_loop_on_invariant_base"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "urlparse() or urlsplit() is repeated inside loops for invariant base values."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
